title: tephrosia oxygona subsp. oxygona
intro: Tephrosia oxygona subsp. oxygona, also known as the "Kalahari eye-berry", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia oxygona subsp. oxygona include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine in Southern Africa.
